name: I fell from a ladder on the job, what evidence do I need?

mainEntity.name: I fell from a ladder on the job, what evidence do I need?

acceptedAnswer.text: Photos, medical records, witnesses, incident report, preserved ladder.[3][5]
acceptedAnswer.description:
Gather medical records, incident reports, photos of the ladder and site, witness statements, and preserve your gear.[3][5]

This proves the fall occurred at work, injury extent, and any safety violations like improper equipment.[1] OSHA logs from employer help too.

- Doctor notes linking injury to fall.
- Supervisor report copy.
- Video if available.

Strong evidence speeds claims and counters denials; photograph before cleanup.[3] An attorney organizes it effectively.

description: Photos, medical records, witnesses, incident report, preserved ladder.[3][5]
